sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of '总' (always) adds emphasis to the frequency of not listening, but does not fundamentally change the meaning of the sentence.
Substituting '好' (good) with '我' (me) changes the object of 'listen' from 'good' (as in 'listen well') to 'me' (as in 'listen to me'), which alters the meaning of the sentence significantly.
